title: Jinn Origin
description: A territorial ghost that remains in the spirit realm till it decides to hunt its prey.
body:
# Jinn (Impact 2)
A territorial ghost that remains in the spirit realm till it decides to hunt its prey.

Pros
- Aggression: Gains access to the aggression stat, which allows an entity to enter into hunting mode, gaining buffs. Gains stacks of aggression in the dark and when hitting living entities.

Mixed
- Undead: You're an undead
- Flicker: Flash in and out of existence

Con
- Hunt: When not hunting, receive weakness 4

Abilities
- [Primary] - Teleport to a point within 10 blocks (Doesn't work during hunt)
- [Secondary] - Able to go into a 'hunt' mode that disables invisibility, grants strength 3 and resistance 2. Increases speed proportional to distance to non-undead (line of sight). Can extend the duration of the hunt through killing living entities.
